data.body: S4b proven-pipe code+tests authored (no live deploy). Files: src/rebar/review_bot/{config,adapter,gerrit_client,dedup,voter,reconcile}.py + extended app.py; tests/unit/test_review_bot.py (19 offline tests, FakeRunner/monkeypatched review_code + fake gerrit, no network/LLM); infra/terraform/monitoring_s4b.tf (rebar-gerrit-voter-errors alarm, dimensionless); infra/scripts/observability.sh (voter_errors journald-grep section); docs/adr/0009-review-bot-pipe.md. Adapter seam code_review_decision(diff_text,repo_root,ref) over review_code(source='local'); BLOCK if any finding severity in configured blocking set (default {critical,high}); fail-closed BLOCK on any error. Vote via Gerrit REST robot_comments /PATCHSET_LEVEL. Dedup SQLite WAL write-on-success + Gerrit-side has_llm_review_vote authoritative check + per-(change,rev) asyncio single-flight lock. Gerrit client is stdlib urllib/subprocess (NO new httpx dep). Validation: ruff check+format clean, mypy clean (8 files), pytest 19/19 pass, terraform fmt+validate ok, import-rebar isolation verified (no fastapi/review_bot pull). ADR 0009 confirmed free (0007/0008 collide from a merge).
